decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressive creatures and powerful spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with efficient removal like Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial, it aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain that pressure throughout the game. The mana base is built to support a diverse range of colors for cards like Tribal Flames and Leyline of the Guildpact, allowing for flexibility in casting spells and adapting to different matchups.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently deal infect damage to the opponent by utilizing creatures with infect abilities such as Glistener Elf and Skrelv, Defector Mite. The deck also includes protection spells like Apostle's Blessing and Spellskite to ensure the creatures can successfully deal damage. The deck aims to boost the infect damage output with spells like Groundswell, Might of Old Krosa, and Scale Up. Overall, the deck focuses on assembling a lethal combination of infect creatures and spells to quickly defeat the opponent.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. By combining powerful artifacts like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal with creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary, this aggro-affinity archetype aims to establish a dominant board presence early in the game. With support from cards like Thoughtcast and Metallic Rebuke, the deck can maintain card advantage and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt also provides the deck with versatile answers to various threats.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize aggressive creatures and low-cost burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent and control the board. The deck focuses on casting cheap spells to trigger prowess abilities on creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Monastery Swiftspear, while also utilizing cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Cori-Steel Cutter for additional damage. Mishra's Bauble is used for card advantage and setting up the top of the deck, while cards like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart are used for direct damage. The deck aims to be fast-paced and efficient in dealing damage to the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana and casting powerful creatures like Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. By utilizing cards like Eldritch Evolution and Neoform, the deck can quickly search through the library for key combo pieces. The inclusion of cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer provide protection against disruption from the opponent. The goal of the deck is to assemble the combo pieces quickly and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and game-ending combos.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Birthing Ritual to get out powerful creatures like Abhorrent Oculus and Ice-Fang Coatl early in the game. With counterspells like Force of Negation and Flare of Denial, the deck aims to control the board and prevent the opponent from developing their own game plan. The addition of bounce and disruption spells like Subtlety and Sink into Stupor helps to further disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the deck aims to establish an early advantage and maintain control of the game until victory.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and utilizing cheap, efficient spells to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. With a low mana curve and a mix of creatures and burn spells, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent and close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize. Mishra's Bauble provides card selection and information, while cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Monastery Swiftspear offer early threats that can grow in power throughout the game. Overall, the deck prioritizes speed and aggression to outpace the opponent and secure a victory.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on playing low-cost aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Monastery Swiftspear to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes cards like Lightning Bolt and Mutagenic Growth for additional reach and removal. The deck aims to maintain pressure throughout the game and finish off the opponent before they can stabilize. Expressive Iteration and Preordain help to filter through the deck and find the necessary cards to keep the aggression going. The land base includes fetch lands to ensure consistent mana sources.

This deck revolves around utilizing the ramp and land tutoring capabilities of Amulet Titan to quickly assemble the key combo pieces needed to overwhelm the opponent. By combining cards like Arboreal Grazer, Primeval Titan, Amulet of Vigor, and Scapeshift, the deck aims to generate massive amounts of mana and tutor for key lands to set up powerful turns. With the ability to generate explosive plays and quickly close out games, the deck aims to outpace and overwhelm opponents in the Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on utilizing Indomitable Creativity to cheat out powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker. Counterspells and removal cards are included to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes card draw and graveyard manipulation to ensure consistency in drawing combo pieces. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements and includes lands that can produce multiple colors of mana. Overall, the deck aims to create explosive plays and overwhelm the opponent with unique and powerful creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's plays with a combination of counterspells, removal spells like Fatal Push and Sheoldred's Edict, and hand disruption with cards like Subtlety and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian. The deck also features ways to keep the graveyard in check with Cling to Dust and utilizes a variety of land destruction with Field of Ruin. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by denying their resources and gradually taking control of the game.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creature cards and then bringing them back onto the battlefield instantly using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. Atraxa, Grand Unifier acts as the primary target for reanimation, offering powerful abilities and a threatening presence on the battlefield. Other key creatures like Griselbrand provide additional threats and value. The deck also includes cards like Faithful Mending and Psychic Frog to help cycle through the deck and find the necessary pieces for the combo. The strategy revolves around using instant reanimation to overwhelm opponents and secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing spells and abilities to disrupt the opponent's game plan while ramping up mana and card advantage. It aims to control the board with counterspells and removal, while also setting up a win condition through the use of Goblin Charbelcher and other combo pieces. By efficiently managing resources and timing spells correctly, the deck can outmaneuver and outpace opponents to secure a victory without relying on traditional land-based strategies. The key to success lies in carefully sequencing plays and adapting to different matchups to come out on top in Modern 1 vs 1 gameplay.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize cheap and aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Monastery Swiftspear to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Supporting cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Cori-Steel Cutter help maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes efficient spells like Lightning Bolt, Lava Dart, and Mutagenic Growth to control the board and push for damage. The inclusion of Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration allows for card advantage and selection. Overall, this deck aims to be fast and aggressive, putting constant pressure on the opponent while controlling the board.

This creature toolbox deck focuses on utilizing creatures with various abilities in combination with Yawgmoth, Thran Physician to create powerful synergies and generate value. It also includes combo pieces like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Malevolent Rumble for alternate win conditions. The deck is designed to tutor for specific creatures with Green Sun's Zenith and control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push. Boseiju, Who Endures provides protection for key combo pieces, while the mana base includes fetch lands for consistency and utility lands for additional value.
